ingest.title: Ingest Activity
ingest.empty: No ingest runs yet. Click "Run Ingest" to start.
ingest.noRunSelected: Select a run to see details.

upload.label: Upload document
upload.drop: Drop a file here, or click to browse

settings.title: Settings
settings.contextWindowHelp: Maximum tokens sent to the model per request.

llmModels.title: LLM Models
llmModels.desc: One row per provider. Changes take effect immediately. API keys are stored as environment variables — not in this UI.
llmModels.lastProviderWarning: This is the last configured provider. Chat and ingest will fail until a new provider is added.

embeddings.title: Vector Embeddings
embeddings.desc: Enable semantic search against your wiki. Works with OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings endpoints, Ollama native embeddings, and other local models. No API key needed for local models.
embeddings.envNote: Read-only — configured via environment variables (EMBEDDING_URL, EMBEDDING_MODEL, EMBEDDING_DIM). Edit your .env or docker-compose.yml to change.
embeddings.error: Could not load embedding config. Is the backend running?
embeddings.lexicalOnlyNote: Retrieval is running keyword-only (title + body match). Controlled by the EMBEDDINGS_ENABLED environment variable. URL, model, and dimensions below are informational only in this mode.

apiMcp.title: API + MCP
apiMcp.desc: Expose Synapse to your own tools through the local HTTP API, and optionally through the bundled MCP server for agent clients.
apiMcp.error: Could not load MCP server info. Is the backend running?

access.title: Access
access.revealWarning: Copy now — this token will not be shown again.
access.allowWithoutTokenCaveat: Token-less access applies only to private sources (loopback, LAN, Tailscale). Public access via Cloudflare tunnel always requires a token — this is enforced server-side and cannot be bypassed.

remote.title: Remote (claude.ai)
remote.noTokenNote: Generate a token or enable token-less access above to enable remote access.

output.title: Output Preferences
output.desc: Controls for generated content — language, conversation history length.
output.convHistoryDesc: Number of prior messages sent to the AI on each request. More = richer context but more tokens.

interface.title: Interface
interface.comingSoon: Theme and density options — coming soon.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Tools for cleaning up the wiki — detect and merge duplicate entities/concepts that the LLM created under different names across re-ingests.
maintenance.duplicatesDesc: Asks the LLM to scan all entity / concept pages and group ones that likely refer to the same topic under different names (English vs Italian, plural vs singular, abbreviation vs full form). You confirm each group before merging.
maintenance.resetDesc: Clears all locally stored settings and panel layout.

chat.title: Chat
chat.noConversations: No conversations yet. Click + to start.
chat.empty: Send a message to start chatting.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask anything… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

research.title: Deep Search
research.topicHint: Synapse will search the web, assess sources, and synthesize a wiki page.
research.empty: No research runs yet. Enter a topic and click Start Research.
research.noRunSelected: Select a run to see its detail and synthesis.

review.title: Review Queue
review.hint: Pages recently generated by the ingest pipeline — approve, skip, or start deep research.
review.empty: No pending items. Ingest some documents to populate the review queue.
review.searxngUnavailable: Deep research is unavailable: SEARXNG_URL is not configured on the backend.

cascadeDelete.warningsHint: These pages share source overlap with the page being deleted. The deletion will proceed, but review these after.
cascadeDelete.wikilinksCount: {{count}} dead [[wikilink]] will be neutralised to plain text
cascadeDelete.wikilinksCount_plural: {{count}} dead [[wikilinks]] will be neutralised to plain text
cascadeDelete.indexEntryRemoved: Entry in index.md will be removed
cascadeDelete.rawSourceDeleted: Raw source file will be deleted
cascadeDelete.noPagesDeleted: Only this page will be deleted.
cascadeDelete.noWikilinksToRewrite: No other pages reference this page.
cascadeDelete.noRawSource: No raw source file to delete.
